events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: skipping the try-step means isolation was never actually verified — the machine could still hold hazardous energy while workers assume it's safe. That's a critical, non-compliant condition under OSHA 1910.147(d)(6), so the result is a **fail** with work stopped until an authorized employee performs and documents the try-step (attempt normal start controls, confirm no motion, bleed/check residual energy) before servicing resumes.
